# P-F-003 — Supplier-circular flow (A→B→C→A)

> Flux circulaire entre fournisseurs

## Description (EN)

Cycle of ≥ 3 suppliers, each invoicing a generic service to the next, returning to A.

## Description (FR)

Cycle d'au moins trois fournisseurs où chaque facture est un service générique au suivant.

<!-- END auto-generated -->

## Detection logic

Supplier circular flow — funds flow supplier-A → supplier-B → supplier-A in payment edges, indicating kickback laundering through a sister entity.

## Likelihood-ratio reasoning

Default prior 0.35 + weight 0.85.

## Known false-positive traps

- **Legitimate inter-company supply chains** in vertically-integrated groups.

## Production wiring

Requires payment-edge graph traversal — extends the round-trip BFS substrate to detect bidirectional cycles. Currently uses a simplified version reading `metadata.circularFlowDetected`.
